name: ICT Silver Bullet
description: ICT Silver Bullet strategy targeting liquidity sweeps and FVG entries during London/NY killzones with precise risk management.

entryRules.name: Liquidity Sweep
entryRules.description: Wait for sweep of recent swing high/low

entryRules.name: Market Structure Shift
entryRules.description: Break of structure in opposite direction after sweep

entryRules.name: FVG Entry
entryRules.description: Enter on retrace to Fair Value Gap

confirmations.name: Killzone Timing
confirmations.description: Trade only during London (3-5AM EST) or NY (7-10AM EST) killzones

confirmations.name: M15 Displacement
confirmations.description: Strong displacement candle on M15 confirming MSS

stopLoss.description: Place SL beyond the liquidity sweep point

tpTargets.description: TP2 at 3R - move SL to breakeven, close 50%

exitRules.name: Killzone Exit
exitRules.description: Close all positions by end of killzone

exitRules.name: MSS Against Position
exitRules.description: Exit on market structure shift against trade direction

notes: Best results on EURUSD during London open. Avoid trading during NFP, CPI, and FOMC announcements. Focus on quality over quantity - max 2 setups per day.

name: Trend Following Pullback
description: Classic trend following strategy entering on pullbacks to EMA 50 in established trends with confluence from multiple timeframes.

entryRules.name: EMA Trend Filter
entryRules.description: Price above EMA 50 for longs, below for shorts on H4

entryRules.name: EMA 200 Alignment
entryRules.description: EMA 50 above EMA 200 for longs (below for shorts)

entryRules.name: Pullback Entry
entryRules.description: Wait for pullback to EMA 50 zone with rejection candle

confirmations.name: RSI Confirmation
confirmations.description: RSI (14) above 50 for longs, below 50 for shorts

confirmations.name: Volume Spike
confirmations.description: Above average volume on entry candle

stopLoss.description: 1.5x ATR below pullback low (above for shorts)

tpTargets.description: TP1 at 1.5R - close 50%, move to BE

exitRules.name: EMA Cross Exit
exitRules.description: Close on price closing beyond EMA 50 against trend

exitRules.name: Max Hold Time
exitRules.description: Force close after 72 hours if targets not hit

notes: Works best in strong trending markets. Avoid during ranging/consolidation periods. NAS100 and BTCUSD tend to give the best risk-reward setups.

name: Asian Range Breakout
description: Breakout strategy trading the breakout of Asian session range during London open, targeting the NY session with defined risk.

entryRules.name: Asian Range
entryRules.description: Identify high and low of Asian session (00:00-07:00 GMT)

entryRules.name: Breakout Candle
entryRules.description: Strong M15 close beyond Asian range boundary

entryRules.name: Retest Entry
entryRules.description: Enter on retest of broken level

confirmations.name: London Open
confirmations.description: Breakout occurs within first 2 hours of London open

stopLoss.description: Place SL at mid-point of Asian range

exitRules.name: NY Close Exit
exitRules.description: Close all positions by 4PM NY time

notes: Lower win rate but positive expectancy due to favorable R:R. Best on EURUSD and GBPUSD. Skip days with major news during London session.

name: Supply & Demand Zones
description: Trade from fresh supply and demand zones on higher timeframes, entering on price return with confirmation candles.

entryRules.name: Fresh Zone
entryRules.description: Identify fresh supply/demand zone (untested by price)

entryRules.name: Strong Move Origin
entryRules.description: Zone created by strong impulsive move (base -> rally/run)

entryRules.name: Confirmation Candle
entryRules.description: Wait for rejection candle at zone boundary

confirmations.name: MSS Confirmation
confirmations.description: Market structure shift on lower timeframe

confirmations.name: Premium/Discount
confirmations.description: Buy in discount (<50% of range), sell in premium (>50%)

stopLoss.description: Place SL beyond the zone with 5-10 pip buffer

exitRules.name: Zone Breach
exitRules.description: Exit if price closes beyond SL zone

exitRules.name: Weekly Review
exitRules.description: Review all open positions on Sunday

notes: Quality over quantity - only 1-2 setups per week per instrument. Fresh zones give best results. US30 and NAS100 can be volatile - reduce position size by 25%.
